titleStmt.title: SII 24.432: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 432. (A.R. No. 114 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of the village Uṟaiyūr by Rāma-bhaṭṭar, son of Bhūtanātha Tittishṇa-bhaṭṭar of Gautama-gōtra towards offerings to the god and the goddess on the occasion of their halt at Uṟaiyūr maṇḍapa during the Achyutarāyar festival. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1459, wrong for 1460, Viḷambi, Ṛishabha, ba. 3, Friday, Uttirāḍam correspond to . 1538 A.D., May 17, Friday, ·10, f.d.n. ·29.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīman masārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvirapratāpa śrīviraaccutadevamasārāyar pṛthuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakaābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 9 Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa viḷambi samvatsarattu vṛṣaba nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣañca tritiyaiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa Uttirāṭa nakṣatrattuṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulāśa nivaḷaṉāṭṭuviḻāvaṟā vitivaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaramkan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganātha devaśrībhaṇṭārattukku gautama
gotrattu Āślāyana sūtram rikkuśāka(r)āttiyāyiyāna pūtanāta[tittiṣṇa] bhaṭṭar putran Irāmabhaṭṭan daṇḍan samarppittu kuṭutta dhammaśāsanappaṭṭayam . nammuṭaiya [ Ubhaiyam] Āka cittirait tirunāḷ Āna Accyuta Irāyar tirunāḷaikku Uṟaiūr maṇṭapattil perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar Añcām tirunāḷaikku Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa campāttaḷikai 5 10kku ḷa 5¥ cempāttaḷikai 2kkupu4 Āka taḷikai 5 10 2-kku
poṉ 5pu4¥ pori Amutu 100- kku pu5- veccamutu kūṉ 5 10- kku kūṉ 3kku pu1 Āka poṉ 1 pu 7 Atirasam 2 100-kku ḷa 1- cukiyaṉ 2 100kku pu- 6 vaṭai 2 100- kku pu100 cantaṉam paṭi 3 10- kku pu 3 A mutu 1000 5 100 kku pu 2 Ilai Amutu 3 1000 kku pu 1 Erikarumpu kaṭṭu 4 10 kku pu5 maṇṭapattil parivaṭṭavilai pu 8 nācciyār parikalattukku pu 2 tirukkuttu maṇiviḷakkukkum pantattukku ney yamutu vilaikkum pantam piṭitta perkaḷ koṭikkuṭai Eṭutta perkaḷ kūlikkum Uḷppaṭa poṉ 5 pu 1
Āka toppuc ciṟappuk kaṭṭaḷaikku poṉ 10 7¥ Irāmāpaṭṭar Ayyaṉ Upaiyamāka nācciyār Uṟaiyūrvalli nācciyāṟku Amutuceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa ttaḷikai 2kku Amutupaṭi paruppu Amutu neyamutu kompil Añcu koṭiyil Añcu kaṟiamutu pala sambhāram Erikarumpu Uḷppaṭa taḷikai 1- kku pu 1- Āka nāḷ 1- kku taḷikai 2- kku pu- 2 Āka varuṣam 1- kku nāḷ 3 100 6 10 5- kku ḷa 7pu3 Āka varuṣam 1- kku ḷa 9 10 Intap poṉ toṇṇū ṟṟukkum
tiruviṭai Āṭṭam Āka cetta tiruccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi teṉkarai ra ḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr (ki) grāmam 1 Inta kiḻakku grāmam nāṉku Ellai ya nattam paṭukai Uḷppaṭṭa Ūr Oṉṟukku prākku dāṉamāniyam paṭṭavṛtti niṅkal Āka niṉṟa nañce puñce nattam paṭukai tiṭar Uḷpaṭa tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Āka śrīpaṇṭārattile Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu Inta Uṟaiyūr grāmattil Upaiyaṅkoṇṭu varuṣa(m)
ntoṟum tiruṉāḷk kaṭṭaḷaikkum maṇṭapattil Amutu ceytaruḷum taḷikai tiru ḷa vakaiyum Uṟaiyūr vallinācciyār Amutu ceytaruḷum taḷikai Iraṇṭukkum perumāḷ ḻvāṟku tiru viṭaiyāṭṭam Āka cetta Uṟaiyūr grāmam Oṉṟukku nā jalapāṣāṇa kṣaṇyāgāmisitthasātthyam Eṉṉappaṭṭa Aṣṭabho
gadeśasvāmiyaṅkaḷum Uḷpaṭa Ācandrārkkasthāyi Āka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷak kaṭavatākavum Inta taruḷum ti raṇṭukku ṇṭapacciṟappuk kaṭṭaḷai Āka Amutu ceytaruḷum vakaikku pattil Oṉṟum kāvukkuk kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭi candrādityavaraiyil san=tāṉaparamparaiyāka naṭattak kaṭavatākavum
Inta śilāśāsanam Eḻutinamaikku kovilk kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇa t śreyo dānāt ṇyam paradattānu pālanam . paradattāpahāreṇa svadattam niṣpalam bhavet . svadattām paradattaām vā yo hareta vasuñḍa rām . ṣaṣṭarvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāñjāyate krimiḥ §
Digital edition of SII 24.432 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
